ideation: This sequence mimics the action of brushing teeth. It starts with arms outstretched, then brings them to the mouth, and finally returns to a relaxed position. The left arm mimes holding the toothbrush, while the right arm supports the head.  The sequence uses the robot's two-joint arms to simulate the motion.  Both arms start slightly away from the body, then the left arm moves to the mouth area, and finally both arms return to their starting position.

frames.beat: arms start relaxed, ready to brush
left arm brings brush to mouth, right supports head
arms return to relaxed state, brushing complete
